mapper.select: SELECT GRADE_NAME, MIN_LEVEL, MAX_LEVEL FROM LQ_GRADE_RANGE ORDER BY NVL(MIN_LEVEL, 1) ASC, NVL(MAX_LEVEL, 999999) ASC
SELECT REWARD_ITEM_ID, NAME, DESCRIPTION, PRICE_POINT, STOCK, STATUS, CREATED_AT FROM LQ_REWARD_ITEM ORDER BY CREATED_AT DESC, REWARD_ITEM_ID DESC

SELECT NVL( ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM LQ_USER_QUEST UQ WHERE UQ.USER_ID = U.USER_ID AND UQ.STATUS = 'COMPLETED' AND UQ.COMPLETED_AT IS NOT NULL AND UQ.COMPLETED_AT >= TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'IW') AND UQ.COMPLETED_AT < TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'IW') + 7 ), 0 ) AS QUEST_DONE, NVL( ( SELECT SUM(NVL(Q.REWARD_EXP, 0)) FROM LQ_USER_QUEST UQ INNER JOIN LQ_QUEST Q ON Q.QUEST_ID = UQ.QUEST_ID WHERE UQ.USER_ID = U.USER_ID AND UQ.STATUS = 'COMPLETED' AND UQ.COMPLETED_AT IS NOT NULL AND UQ.COMPLETED_AT >= TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'IW') AND UQ.COMPLETED_AT < TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'IW') + 7 ), 0 ) AS GAIN_XP, NVL( ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM LQ_REWARD_EXCHANGE RE WHERE RE.USER_ID = U.USER_ID AND UPPER(NVL(RE.STATUS, '')) = 'USED' AND RE.USED_AT IS NOT NULL AND RE.USED_AT >= TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'IW') AND RE.USED_AT < TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'IW') + 7 ), 0 ) AS USED_COUPON, NVL( ( SELECT LEAST( 100, GREATEST( 1, ROUND((R.MY_RANK * 100.0) / NULLIF(R.TOTAL_COUNT, 0)) ) ) FROM ( SELECT X.RN AS MY_RANK, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM LQ_USER RU WHERE UPPER(NVL(RU.STATUS, 'ACTIVE')) = 'ACTIVE' ) AS TOTAL_COUNT FROM ( SELECT UR.USER_ID, UR.NICKNAME, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY NVL(UR.EXP, 0) DESC, UR.USER_ID ASC) AS RN FROM LQ_USER UR WHERE UPPER(NVL(UR.STATUS, 'ACTIVE')) = 'ACTIVE' ) X WHERE X.USER_ID = U.USER_ID ) R ), 100 ) AS TOP_PERCENT, 0 AS WEEKLY_PROGRESS FROM LQ_USER U WHERE UPPER(NVL(U.STATUS, 'ACTIVE')) = 'ACTIVE' AND U.NICKNAME = #{_parameter} AND ROWNUM = 1
SELECT USER_ID, USER_LOGIN_ID, NAME, EMAIL, PASSWORD, NICKNAME, BIRTH, GENDER, ROLE, EXP, POINT, STATUS FROM LQ_USER WHERE USER_ID = #{value} AND UPPER(NVL(STATUS, 'ACTIVE')) = 'ACTIVE'
SELECT REWARD_ITEM_ID, NAME, DESCRIPTION, PRICE_POINT, STOCK, STATUS, CREATED_AT FROM LQ_REWARD_ITEM WHERE REWARD_ITEM_ID = #{value}
mapper.update: UPDATE LQ_REWARD_ITEM SET STOCK = STOCK - 1, STATUS = CASE WHEN STOCK - 1 <= 0 THEN 'SOLD_OUT' ELSE 'ON_SALE' END WHERE REWARD_ITEM_ID = #{rewardItemId} AND STATUS = 'ON_SALE' AND STOCK > 0
mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_LQ_REWARD_EXCHANGE_PK.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO LQ_REWARD_EXCHANGE ( EXCHANGE_ID, USER_ID, REWARD_ITEM_ID, USED_POINT, STATUS, EXPIRED_AT, USED_AT, EXCHANGED_AT ) VALUES ( #{exchangeId}, #{userId}, #{rewardItemId}, #{usedPoint}, 'EXCHANGED', SYSDATE + 7, NULL, SYSDATE )

INSERT INTO LQ_POINT_HISTORY ( POINT_HISTORY_ID, USER_ID, POINT_AMOUNT, CATEGORY, DESCRIPTION, CREATED_AT ) VALUES ( SEQ_LQ_POINT_HISTORY_PK.NEXTVAL, #{userId}, #{pointAmount}, #{category}, #{description}, SYSDATE )
INSERT INTO LQ_BADGE ( BADGE_ID, NAME, DESCRIPTION, CONDITION_TEXT, ICON_URL, CREATED_AT ) VALUES ( SEQ_LQ_BADGE_PK.NEXTVAL, #{name}, #{description}, #{conditionText}, #{iconUrl}, SYSDATE )
INSERT INTO LQ_USER_BADGE ( USER_BADGE_ID, USER_ID, BADGE_ID, EARNED_AT ) VALUES ( SEQ_LQ_USER_BADGE_PK.NEXTVAL, #{userId}, #{badgeId}, SYSDATE )
mapper.select: SELECT BADGE_ID, NAME, DESCRIPTION, CONDITION_TEXT, ICON_URL FROM LQ_BADGE WHERE BADGE_ID = #{value}

SELECT B.BADGE_ID, B.NAME, B.DESCRIPTION, B.CONDITION_TEXT, B.ICON_URL, UB.EARNED_AT FROM LQ_USER_BADGE UB INNER JOIN LQ_USER U ON U.USER_ID = UB.USER_ID INNER JOIN LQ_BADGE B ON B.BADGE_ID = UB.BADGE_ID WHERE UPPER(NVL(U.STATUS, 'ACTIVE')) = 'ACTIVE' AND U.NICKNAME = #{_parameter} ORDER BY UB.EARNED_AT DESC, UB.USER_BADGE_ID DESC

SELECT RE.EXCHANGE_ID, RI.NAME, NVL(NULLIF(TRIM(RI.DESCRIPTION), ''), '리워드 상점') AS STORE, RE.STATUS, RE.EXPIRED_AT, CASE WHEN RE.EXPIRED_AT IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE TRUNC(RE.EXPIRED_AT) - TRUNC(SYSDATE) END AS DAYS_LEFT FROM LQ_REWARD_EXCHANGE RE INNER JOIN LQ_REWARD_ITEM RI ON RI.REWARD_ITEM_ID = RE.REWARD_ITEM_ID WHERE RE.EXCHANGE_ID = #{value}
